Reasoning: The current visit record primarily details diagnoses and procedures related to peripheral vascular complications, cellulitis, coronary atherosclerosis, and urinary complications. There is no explicit mention of hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid disorder diagnosis or ongoing management of a lipid disorder in the provided records. Therefore, based strictly on the evidence provided, there is no strong and explicit basis to predict that a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the next hospital visit.
